content.text:
Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1: DescriptionList requires DescriptionListGroup
The rule says that `<DescriptionList>` must contain `<DescriptionListGroup>` as a direct child. Currently, `<DisplayTitle>` is the direct child of each `<DescriptionList>`. I need to wrap the children of each `<DescriptionList>` in a `<DescriptionListGroup>`.

There are 4 instances:
- Line 58-60: `<DescriptionList className="forklift-page-secret-title"><DisplayTitle .../></DescriptionList>`
- Line 72-74: same pattern
- Line 86-92: same pattern (multi-line DisplayTitle)
- Line 107-113: same pattern (no className)

I need to add `DescriptionListGroup` to the import.

### Fix 2: Replace `Text` with `Content`
`Text` is deprecated; replace with `Content`. Looking at usages:
- Line 61: `<Text>{fields.user.description}</Text>`
- Line 75: `<Text>{fields.password.description}</Text>`
- Line 90: `helpContent={<Text>{fields.insecureSkipVerify.helperTextPopover}</Text>}`
- Line 93: `<Text>{fields.insecureSkipVerify.description}</Text>`
- Line 111: `helpContent={<Text>{fields.cacert.helperTextPopover}</Text>}`
- Line 114: `<Text>{fields.cacert.description}</Text>`

Replace all `<Text>` with `<Content>` and update the import: remove `Text`, add `Content`.

Let me apply all changes:

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — DescriptionList requires DescriptionListGroup (`sd-cf-descriptionlist-descriptionlist-req-group`)
**Applied.** Wrapped the children of all 4 `<DescriptionList>` instances (lines 58, 72, 86, 107) in `<DescriptionListGroup>`. Added `DescriptionListGroup` to the `@patternfly/react-core` import.

### Fix 2 — Replace `Text` with `Content` (`semver-text-component-import-deprecated`)
**Applied.** Replaced all 6 occurrences of `<Text>` / `</Text>` with `<Content>` / `</Content>` (lines 61, 75, 90, 93, 111, 114). Updated the import: removed `Text`, added `Content` from `@patternfly/react-core`.
